---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect (use "Conversion quality" for output artifacts)
title: ''
labels: bug
---

## Environment

- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.12.2)
- **any2md version:** (output of `any2md --version` or `pip show any2md`)
- **Operating system:** (e.g. macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Docling installed?** (yes / no — `pip show docling` to check)

## Command run

The full `any2md ...` command, including all flags. Paste it verbatim:

```
any2md ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error message, stack trace, or stderr
output:

```
paste error output here
```

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — recent changes to your environment, whether
the same command worked on a previous version, etc.

> If this is about incorrect Markdown output rather than a crash or
> behavioral defect, please use the **Conversion quality** template
> instead — it asks for the input snippet and output snippet that are
> required to reproduce the artifact.
